name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command, flow action, or capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## What are you trying to do?

<!-- Describe the use case, not the feature. "I want to test X but currently..." -->

## How do you currently handle this (if at all)?

<!-- Workaround you're using, or why you can't do it today. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Optional. If you have a specific idea, describe it here.
     New commands follow the pattern: ghostrun <verb>:<noun> (e.g. flow:import, perf:run) -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought of. -->

## Would you be willing to open a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this
- [ ] I can help test it
- [ ] No, just the idea

## Additional context

<!-- Links, examples from other tools, screenshots, etc. -->
